title: Invisible Light
description: Adds a crafting recipe for invisible light block.
body:
Invisible Light mod adds a crafting recipe for invisible light source, it has level 15 of light, and crafted with 1 blaze powder, 5 glass, and 1 copper ingot, which are placed as shown on a screenshot.                                      



![Crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20f04a58da3f6ade441cb954f3d640ead98b1678.png)
